title: rubus brevistachys
intro: Rubus brevistachys, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Rubus brevistachys include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus brevistachys include infusions, tinctures, and ointments that can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
